title: Cell Culture Transfection and Immunoblotting
author: Roberta Marongiu
materials: Incubate with HRP-coupled secondary antibodies for 1 hour at room temperature .
Incubate with primary antibodies in blocking buffer or TBST overnight at 4 degrees .
Apply Lumigen chemiluminescent reagents to the membrane according to the manufacturer’s instructions.
Maintain N27 cells in complete DMEM medium
Seed cells to appropriate density prior to transfection.
Quantify protein concentration using a BCA assay .
Lyse cells using the prepared Lysis Buffer (chilled).
Aspirate medium and wash cells with PBS.
Analyze protein band density using Quantity One software.
Capture images using the VersaDoc MP 4000 system.

steps.title: Incubate at 37 °C in 5%...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 °C in 5% CO2 and 95% humidified air

steps.title: Follow the specific manufacturer’s protocol (Promega) for reagent-to-DNA ratios
steps.instruction: Follow the specific manufacturer’s protocol (Promega) for reagent-to-DNA ratios.

steps.title: Perform transient DNA transfection of pAAV using FuGENE6 reagent
steps.instruction: Perform transient DNA transfection of pAAV using FuGENE6 reagent.

steps.title: Prepare samples by normalizing to an...
steps.instruction: Prepare samples by normalizing to an equal amount of protein (100ug per sample).

steps.title: Centrifuge lysates to remove debris and...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge lysates to remove debris and collect the supernatant (whole cell lysate).

steps.title: Load 100ug of protein into each...
steps.instruction: Load 100ug of protein into each lane of an SDS-PAGE gel.

steps.title: Transfer proteins from the gel to a PVDF membrane
steps.instruction: Transfer proteins from the gel to a PVDF membrane .

steps.title: Block the membrane with 5% milk...
steps.instruction: Block the membrane with 5% milk in TBST for 1 hour at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash the membrane again with TBST
steps.instruction: Wash the membrane again with TBST.

steps.title: Wash the membrane with TBST (typically...
steps.instruction: Wash the membrane with TBST (typically 3 times for 10 minutes).
